source_jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
OffDeal is the world’s first AI-native investment bank for small businesses. Instead of selling AI to Goldman Sachs, we’re building what Goldman itself would have looked like if it launched in 2025.

Wall Street's playbook works well, but only for billion-dollar deals - it breaks where most businesses actually exist. Traditional firms run oversized teams on outdated software, making smaller M&A transactions uneconomical. This leaves millions of small business owners with nowhere to turn for the most important sale of their lives… Until now.

Our engineers built software to automate 80%+ of analyst work with AI, so our in-house bankers can focus where it counts - on earning owners’ trust and closing deals.

We recently closed a $12M Series A ($17M in total funding) from Radical Ventures and Y Combinator and are scaling really fast. In less than a year, our team has already launched over 30 sell-side M&A transactions and has delivered numerous life-changing exits to our clients - and we’re just getting started.



Read more about our story:

 - https://www.ft.com/content/9daf5c7e-e301-4b7d-809a-ff9fb336bdbc

 - https://www.cnbc.com/video/2025/08/04/wall-streets-new-ai-era-offdeal-ceo-on-using-ai-to-disrupt-investment-banking.html

 - https://www.fullydistributed.co/p/the-bull-case-for-an-ai-native-investment



The Role

As a Senior Software Engineer, you'll work directly with the CTO to build the AI-native platform that empowers our investment bankers to be 10x more productive. Your work will directly impact how $10 trillion worth of small businesses change hands over the coming decade.



What You'll Do

 - Collaborate with our in-house investment bankers to own 0 to 1 projects, from ideation to deployment

 - Build across the entire stack, in our 100% TypeScript (i.e. ReactJS + NodeJS) codebase

 - Work with the latest AI tech, from on our in-house AI agents to complex recommendation and search algorithms https://medium.com/@alston.lin/bundling-unbundling-of-vector-dbs-332f03844158



We’re Looking for Someone Who Has / Is a…

 - 2+ years of work experience of shipping 0 to 1 products in TypeScript, React, and NodeJS

 - Comfort in ambiguous and unstructured startup work environments

 - Generalist with a love of building across the stack

 - Strong product sense, being able to be their own product manager and designer



Why Join OffDeal

 - We only hire best-in-class engineers, and are offering compensation to reflect it

 - Top-tier benefits, including medical, dental, vision, and unlimited PTO

 - Revenue sharing - 10% of every dollar above our annual hurdle gets split amongst the team

 - 401K Matching

 - Perks like free food, Equinox membership, and NYC relocation allowance

 - Work with bleeding edge AI on a modern codebase

 - Opportunity to be a foundational team member at a well-funded, high-growth startup

 - Be part of a mission to shape the future of small business ownership and to promote American entrepreneurship

source_jobs.title: Investment Banker II
source_jobs.description:
Investment banking hasn't fundamentally changed in decades — until now. At OffDeal, we're building the world's first AI-native investment bank. Instead of selling software to Goldman Sachs, we're building what Goldman itself would look like if it launched in 2025.

Wall Street's playbook works for billion-dollar deals, but it breaks where most businesses actually exist. Traditional firms run oversized teams on outdated processes, making lower middle market transactions uneconomical. This leaves millions of founders with nowhere to turn for the most important sale of their lives.

We're changing that. We focus exclusively on the lower middle market ($1–10M EBITDA) — founder-led businesses where relationships and judgment matter more than financial engineering. Our platform is a force multiplier: proprietary intelligence, AI-generated first drafts, automated buyer sourcing, and real-time deal insights — so you can deliver more value to clients and close more deals than any traditional banker could alone.

OffDeal has raised $17M from Y Combinator, Radical Ventures, and others. We've generated millions in fees with a lean but mighty team.

Read more about our story:

 - Financial Times - Behold the first AI-native investment bank https://www.ft.com/content/9daf5c7e-e301-4b7d-809a-ff9fb336bdbc

 - CNBC - Wall Street's new AI era https://www.cnbc.com/video/2025/08/04/wall-streets-new-ai-era-offdeal-ceo-on-using-ai-to-disrupt-investment-banking.html

 - Blog - The Bull Case for an AI-native investment bank https://www.fullydistributed.co/p/the-bull-case-for-an-ai-native-investment




THE ROLE

At a traditional bank, you might wait a decade before developing real sector expertise or becoming a thought leader in a vertical. At OffDeal, that starts day one. You'll develop deep coverage in sectors you care about, become the banker that founders in your space know by name, and build a reputation as the person who owns your market.

You'll run full transaction processes supported by our platform, a junior banking partner, and world-class software engineers. But execution is only part of the job. The other part — arguably, the more fun one — is origination: meeting American entrepreneurs and cultivating the relationships that become tomorrow's deals.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

Build Your Practice. Own a sector. Become the banker that business owners call first.

Own the Full Deal. Drive transactions from kick-off to close. Manage timelines, anticipate bottlenecks, and guide founders through the emotional complexity of selling their life's work.

Leverage the Platform. The AI handles the first 80%. You bring the judgment, empathy, and negotiation instincts that win.

Shape the Product. You're not just using cutting-edge AI tools — you're building them. When something doesn't exist yet, you do it manually and then work with engineering to automate it.




A WEEK AT OFFDEAL

 - Meet with four family-owned businesses — calls and in-person — building relationships with founders targeting exits in 2026 and beyond

 - Fly to Philadelphia for an in-person buyer diligence session on an active deal

 - Prepare for an upcoming asphalt and paving conference in Las Vegas where you'll meet dozens of potential clients

 - Review an AI-generated CIM and add the final polish — sharpening the narrative, pressure-testing the story

 - Analyze five competing LOIs and deliver negotiation strategy to your client

 - Sit down with engineering to turn your manual buyer outreach process into the next platform feature




WHO YOU ARE

Classically Trained, Modern Mindset. 5–8 years of experience. You've mastered the fundamentals, but you're excited to work in ways that didn't exist five years ago. You see AI and technology as leverage and the ultimate force multiplier.

A Deal Junkie. You're not in banking for the Excel reps. Execution has been the job, but you're ready to originate. Not in ten years — now.

Scrappy. We're a startup. When the tech has a bug, you build the

source_jobs.title: Investment Banker I
source_jobs.description:
Investment banking hasn't fundamentally changed in decades — until now. At OffDeal, we're building the world's first AI-native investment bank. Instead of selling software to Goldman Sachs, we're building what Goldman itself would look like if it launched in 2025.

Wall Street's playbook works for billion-dollar deals, but it breaks where most businesses actually exist. Traditional firms run oversized teams on outdated processes, making lower middle market transactions uneconomical. This leaves millions of founders with nowhere to turn for the most important sale of their lives.

We're changing that. We focus exclusively on the lower middle market ($1–10M EBITDA) — founder-led businesses where relationships and judgment matter more than financial engineering. Our platform is a force multiplier: proprietary intelligence, AI-generated first drafts, automated buyer sourcing, and real-time deal insights — so you can deliver more value to clients and close more deals than any traditional banker could alone.

OffDeal has raised $17M from Y Combinator, Radical Ventures, and others. We've generated millions in fees with a lean but mighty team.

Read more about our story:

 - Financial Times - Behold the first AI-native investment bank https://www.ft.com/content/9daf5c7e-e301-4b7d-809a-ff9fb336bdbc

 - CNBC - Wall Street's new AI era https://www.cnbc.com/video/2025/08/04/wall-streets-new-ai-era-offdeal-ceo-on-using-ai-to-disrupt-investment-banking.html

 - Blog - The Bull Case for an AI-native investment bank https://www.fullydistributed.co/p/the-bull-case-for-an-ai-native-investment

 


THE ROLE

At a traditional bank, junior bankers often spend years waiting for meaningful exposure to clients, buyers, and real deal decision-making. At OffDeal, you will get those reps much earlier.

As an Investment Banker I, you will work directly with senior bankers across live deal execution and origination support. You will participate in client meetings, work directly with private equity and strategic buyers, manage transaction diligence workstreams, as well as keep deal processes moving.

You will also work closely with our Product & Engineering teams. You will be a power user of the OffDeal platform, using AI to move faster across research, materials, diligence, and execution — and helping our engineers understand where the product needs to get better.

This is a rare opportunity for a junior banker to get real deal exposure, direct interaction with middle market private equity buyers, and a front-row seat to building a new model for investment banking.

 


WHAT YOU'LL DO

Support Live Deals. Help senior bankers run active transaction processes. Field diligence requests, coordinate with buyers, and broadly make sure nothing falls through the cracks, getting exposure to every phase of a live transaction – not just the model.

Work With Buyers. Build and manage relationships with middle market private equity firms, independent sponsors, family offices, and strategic acquirers. Help identify relevant buyers, coordinate outreach, track feedback, and join buyer calls.

Prepare High-Quality Materials. Create client-facing decks, buyer materials, financial analyses, valuation support, business summaries, and process updates. Our AI Agent Archie will give you a strong headstart, but you will need to bring your commercial judgement and polish.

Support Origination. Help senior bankers evaluate new opportunities, prepare for founder conversations, follow up with prospects, and support the work that turns relationships into signed engagements.

Leverage the Platform. Use OffDeal’s AI tools across research, outreach, diligence, materials, and execution. When a workflow is manual or painful, help our engineering team turn it into product.

Grow Into a Closer. You’ve spent a year building the technical foundation. Here, you’ll learn how to talk to a seller, how to read a buyer, how to move a deal forward. Learn how deals are sourced, pitched, executed, neg

source_jobs.title: Director of Sales Development
source_jobs.description:
The Role

We're scaling our outbound Sales Development team and need a sales leader to own it: run the team, own the performance, and dictate where it goes next. The current strategy already works and is producing a high volume of conversations and new pipeline. Your job is to take it from good to exceptional: hyperscale what's working, be a hands-on coach who raises the ceiling on every rep and turns a functioning floor into an even greater competitive advantage for how OffDeal sources deal.

You're not inheriting a mess to clean up; you're inheriting established workflows, targets, and infrastructure that are already in place, which means you start from a strong baseline and focus on how much further this can go. You'll have real room to test new approaches, coach the team to a higher standard, and build the unit that makes this floor the best version of itself as it grows.

Job Location: This is an in-person role based in our New York City office, 5 days per week in office. Office Location: 450 West 14th St, New York, NY, we moved from 30th St

 

What You'll Own

Daily floor performance & Analytics.

 - Driving BD performance day to day: setting the pace, pushing the team past benchmark, and knowing exactly where metrics stand at any moment.

 - Owning the numbers: tracking connects, completion, and conversion rates by rep and by team, and using that data to know where to step in before it becomes a problem.

 - Diagnosing what's holding performance back across list, script, and rep delivery, and translating that diagnosis into a fix

Coaching and team leadership.

 - Staying plugged into the floor daily: live step-ins, call reviews, and real-time coaching, not just scheduled check-ins. Owning the master objection-handling guide and script development.

 - Building a real team unit to keep the BD team motivated through a high-rejection job, day to day.

 - Recruiting, interviewing, and ramping up new BDs, including full ownership of onboarding during the first 30 days.

Managing the lead handoff.

 - Owning the handoff of cold and warm leads between BDs and bankers, end to end.

 - Setting the bar for what counts as a qualified, ready-to-route lead, and holding the team to that standard.

 - Owning de-escalations and no-show tracking end to end to maintain a real two-way system between BDs and bankers instead of a one-off chase.

 - Running the list pipeline day to day and monitoring runway so BDs never go dry.

What We're Looking For

 - 4+ years in outbound sales/BD, with 2+ years directly leading a team.

 - Personally cold-called and carried a quota, not just supervised callers.

 - Directly managed a BD/SDR team of roughly 3–10 reps

 - Owned the tech stack of a BD team

 - Leads from the front: can get on the phones and coach by example, not just from a dashboard.

 - A real motivator, someone who builds team identity under a high-volume, high-rejection grind.

 - Scrappy enough to own the unglamorous ops (list exports, load checks) without treating it as beneath the role.

 - A systems thinker, you'll be running what is functionally a manufacturing process, and a data-hygiene stickler, since bad data breaks the whole machine.

Other Requirements

 - Will not require citizen sponsorship

 - Fits into our salary, commission and OTE range.

 - Lives in commutable distance to New York City, and willing to be in office 5 days a week

Compensation Details:

On Target Earnings: $220,000 + Bonus

Salary Range: $150,000 - 155,000

Commission: $65,000 - $70,000

Compensation Structure: Paid for the team reaching their goals (1) Completed Conversations and (2) Qualified Opportunities

Other Benefits:

→ Equinox gym membership

→ Unlimited PTO + free meals

→ Full medical, dental, vision

→ 401k match

→ NYC relocation assistance



Apply Now!

If you are ready to have your sales career take off, we encourage you to apply.



Our Interview Process:

1) Apply and submit the additional content as outlined in the section below.

2

notes: AI-native investment bank with a mix of tech and non-tech roles
